_comment: ROG Monitor device profiles. Each entry describes the power/clock control surface for a specific laptop model.
_custom_override: Create ~/.config/rog-monitor/device.json with the same structure to override the active profile. The 'id' field must match the auto-detected device or be 'custom'.
_clock_offset_note: base_clock_offset and mem_clock_offset ranges here are the SAFE UI defaults. The absolute driver limits (NVML) override these at runtime (core: -1000..+1000, mem: -2000..+6000). The UI shows the safe range and requires double consent to exceed it.

controls.description_es: Potencia CPU sostenida (TDP largo plazo). Reducir protege batería/temperatura a costa de rendimiento base.
controls.description_en: Sustained CPU power limit (long-term TDP). Lowering saves battery/temperature at the cost of sustained performance.

controls.description_es: Potencia CPU en ráfaga (~2 min). Controla picos de carga cortos.
controls.description_en: CPU burst power limit (~2 min). Controls short load spikes.

controls.description_es: Vatios extra que la GPU puede tomar del presupuesto de la CPU cuando el CPU está subutilizado.
controls.description_en: Extra watts the GPU can take from CPU budget when CPU is underutilised.

controls.description_es: Temperatura máxima permitida para la GPU. El firmware hace throttling al alcanzarla. 87 °C es el límite del firmware.
controls.description_en: Maximum allowed GPU temperature. Firmware throttles at this point. 87 °C is the firmware hard ceiling.

controls._safe_range_note: Safe UI range: -200..+200 MHz. NVML absolute: -1000..+1000. Values beyond safe range require double consent.
controls.description_es: Offset de frecuencia del núcleo GPU vía NVML. Funciona en Wayland. Rango seguro: -200..+200 MHz; rango absoluto del driver: -1000..+1000 MHz. El SET requiere contraseña (pkexec).
controls.description_en: GPU core clock offset via NVML. Works on Wayland. Safe range: -200..+200 MHz; driver absolute range: -1000..+1000 MHz. SET requires root (pkexec).

controls._safe_range_note: Safe UI range: -500..+1000 MHz. NVML absolute: -2000..+6000. Values beyond safe range require double consent.
controls.description_es: Offset de frecuencia de memoria GPU vía NVML. Funciona en Wayland. Rango seguro: -500..+1000 MHz; rango absoluto del driver: -2000..+6000 MHz. El SET requiere contraseña (pkexec).
controls.description_en: GPU memory clock offset via NVML. Works on Wayland. Safe range: -500..+1000 MHz; driver absolute range: -2000..+6000 MHz. SET requires root (pkexec).

devices.name: Genérico (auto-detectado)
devices._comment: Ranges are read live from sysfs / NVML at runtime; defaults below are placeholders overridden by live reads.
